Title: [Prefix] Description
  Prefix mirrors the branch — feature/ → [Feature], fix/ → [Fix],
  hotfix/ → [Hotfix], enhancement/ → [Enhancement].
  Description is a noun phrase (start with the subject, not a verb),
  e.g. "[Fix] Tooltip focus restoration on dismiss".
Fill every section in, or write N/A.
-->

## Summary

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run lint`, `npm run typecheck`, `npm test` and `npm run build` pass
- [ ] Added a `CHANGELOG.md` entry under `## [Unreleased]`
- [ ] Updated the relevant `docs/components/*.md`
- [ ] Added or updated tests (including a11y assertions where relevant)
- [ ] Interactive changes keep focus, ARIA and keyboard support correct
- [ ] Breaking changes are described below for the CHANGELOG migration note

_None_ — or describe what consumers must adjust.
